text: The quiet emptiness of the first space brings a sense of peaceful solitude—there is room for reflection, and the lone figure seems immersed in thought, possibly inviting me to do the same. Moving to the second scene, the vividly designed wall and dense clusters of words and screens spark curiosity in me. I feel invigorated by the promise of discovery, as if I'm standing on the threshold between contemplation and innovation. My surroundings urge me to question, to learn, to imagine new connections.
